description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Event Details

Date: Saturday, May 23

Gathering Time: 10:00 AM

Gathering Place: Daini-ku District Administrative Center

Course: Daini-ku District Administrative Center → Akanegataoge Pass → Misugi-dai Seven-Eleven → Asahi-yama Observation Park → Hanno Central District Administrative Center → Hanno City Hall

Distance: Approximately 14 kilometers

Expected Duration: Approximately 4 hours 30 minutes

Fee: 200 yen (materials fee, collected on the day)

What to Bring: Lunch box, drinking water, rain gear, transportation IC card, Sugo-Ashi handbook (if you have one)

Other Notes: Please arrange your own insurance.

Registration: Apply to ASA Hanno by Tuesday, May 19. Phone: 972-4701 / Fax: 974-2190

Weather Cancellation: Check ASA Hanno Central after 3:00 PM on the day before for cancellation due to weather.

Inquiries: Onda 090-2205-8073

Organizer: Hanno Walking Club

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kenkohukusibu/hokencenter/12385.html
summary: ℹ️ Sugo-Ashi Event: Walk the Hanno Two-Day Nago Course on Saturday, May 23, 2026
